SEARCH
Package com.example.eventmanager.models

Class Entrant

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventmanager.models.Entrant
public class Entrant extends Object
Represents a user of the application, encompassing both standard entrants and organizers/admins. This class serves as a pure data model (POJO) to be serialized and deserialized by Firestore. * It contains personal information and system roles, uniquely identified by the device's hardware ID.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Entrant()
    Empty constructor required by Firebase Firestore for automatic data mapping.
    Entrant(String deviceId)
    Constructs a new Entrant with the required unique identifier.

  • Constructor Details

    • Entrant

      public Entrant()
      Empty constructor required by Firebase Firestore for automatic data mapping.

    • Entrant

      public Entrant(String deviceId)
      Constructs a new Entrant with the required unique identifier.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - The unique hardware ID of the user's Android device.

  • Method Details

    • getDeviceId

      public String getDeviceId()
      Gets the user's unique device ID.
      Returns:
      The device ID string.

    • setDeviceId

      public void setDeviceId(String deviceId)
      Sets the user's unique device ID.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - The new device ID string.

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Gets the user's full name.
      Returns:
      The name string.

    • setName

      public void setName(String name)
      Sets the user's full name.
      Parameters:
      name - The new name string.

    • getEmail

      public String getEmail()
      Gets the user's email address.
      Returns:
      The email string.

    • setEmail

      public void setEmail(String email)
      Sets the user's email address.
      Parameters:
      email - The new email string.

    • getPhoneNumber

      public String getPhoneNumber()
      Gets the user's phone number.
      Returns:
      The phone number string.

    • setPhoneNumber

      public void setPhoneNumber(String phoneNumber)
      Sets the user's phone number.
      Parameters:
      phoneNumber - The new phone number string.

    • isAdmin

      public boolean isAdmin()
      Checks if the user has administrative privileges.
      Returns:
      True if the user is an admin, false otherwise.

    • setAdmin

      public void setAdmin(boolean admin)
      Sets the administrative privilege status of the user.
      Parameters:
      admin - True to grant admin privileges, false to revoke.

    • isOrganizer

      public boolean isOrganizer()
      Checks if the user has organizer privileges.
      Returns:
      True if the user is an organizer, false otherwise.

    • setOrganizer

      public void setOrganizer(boolean organizer)
      Sets the organizer privilege status of the user.
      Parameters:
      organizer - True to grant organizer privileges, false to revoke.
